metadata_checks.comments: Title, DOI, year, and empirical survey classification are correct. The paper also studies road pricing and parking fees, but it clearly contains direct fuel-tax support analysis.

final_recommendation_summary: Keep the paper in the strict fuel-tax corpus. The three core fuel-tax determinants are correctly captured: perceived effectiveness, distributional concerns, and personal-finance impacts. However, several control variables were listed as determinants and should be separated into controls rather than main results.
